ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., Men, Women, Kids) */,
  "size_chart_link" TEXT /* Link to a detailed size chart */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Additional description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size this measurement corresponds to */,
  "back_length" TEXT /* Back length measurement */,
  "half_chest" TEXT /* Half chest measurement */,
  "shoulders" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "hip_measurement" TEXT /* Hip measurement for pants and outerwear */,
  "waist_measurement" TEXT /* Waist measurement for pants and outerwear */,
  "inseam_length" TEXT /* Inseam length measurement for pants */,
  "front_length" TEXT /* Front length measurement for shirts and outerwear */,
  "chest_measurement" TEXT /* Full chest measurement for shirts and outerwear */,
  "arm_hole_size" TEXT /* Arm hole size measurement for shirts and outerwear */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs (e.g., shirts, pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is intended (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the product (e.g., Adult, Kids) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material composition of the product */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product this size belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the available size */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Stock level of the product in this size */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last stock update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the size is currently active and available for sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "sku_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SKU */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for this SKU */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last stock check */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* Estimated date for the next reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sku_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Customer preferences (e.g., preferred sizes, brands) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product size being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of this product size being ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product size */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product size */,
  "tax" TEXT /* Tax applied to the product size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the item was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, inventory manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
